resume_contract.completed_when: status is completed, validation exits 0, and expected evidence artifacts exist
resume_contract.ready_when: all dependencies are completed or are completed baseline tasks from SVD-000 through SVD-026
resume_contract.waiting_when: the taskboard records waiting or an incomplete dependency prevents dispatch
resume_contract.active_when: a fresh supervisor observation names the task as running
resume_contract.failed_when: a fresh supervisor observation records a terminal non-zero attempt
resume_contract.stale_when: an observation exceeds its freshness window and must not replace taskboard state
resume_contract.blocked_when: required live MCP endpoint, ORB/IDL generator, release gate, or Meta glasses simulator validation path is unavailable
resume_contract.evidence_churn_rule: generated evidence artifacts are state checkpoints and must not be treated as source implementation churn
resume_contract.accelerate_boundary_rule: downstream release gates must respect SVD-031 if the compatibility endpoint remains bounded

provenance.evidence_authority: per-task Outputs plus preserved evidence records
